bounty_hunter.background_ability: The Hunt Never Ends — Once per day, declare a target. You gain +2 to all rolls that involve tracking, hunting, or hitting that one target in combat. The target does not need to be known to you; it can just be something you are hunting.

cat_burglar.background_ability: Just Someone in the Crowd — Once per day, as long as you are in or near a crowd, you can instantly lose any pursuit. Gain +2 to Stealth for the purposes of breaking and entering.

corporate_security.background_ability: Badge Intimidation — Once per day, flash your old credentials and force someone to hesitate or comply, even if you have not been a cop in years. Gain +2 when trying to Bully any Civilian-type NPCs.

cyber_junkie.background_ability: Overclocked Brain — Once per day, you can either push your neural processor to triple speed, allowing you to use Hacking twice in a single action, or reroll a failed Hacking attempt.

desert_courier.background_ability: Blink and You Miss Me — Once per day, move twice as far in one Movement action, ignoring terrain penalties.

ex_military.background_ability: War Never Changes — You never freeze in combat. If you are ambushed, you still get a turn before anything hits you.

gambler_on_the_run.background_ability: Lady Luck — Once per day, if you roll a 20 on a D20, replace the result with a 2. Once per day, if you have sacrificed a 20 result, you may replace any other result with a Critical Success.

grease_monkey.background_ability: Built Like a Tank — As long as you are repairing something that belongs to you or an ally, you gain +2 to Jury-Rigging and Engineering.

gutter_rat_orphan.background_ability: Rat Runs the Maze — Once per day, you can find a secret, unmonitored path through the city: alleyways, sewer tunnels, maintenance shafts. Even in total lockdown, you always have an escape.

mesh_hacker.background_ability: See What I Want You to See — Once per day, you can use the GhostWalk hack without having to roll for success.

pilot.background_ability: Get There Fast — Once per Day, you can double the Movement speed of a Vehicle or Mech for one Round.

piss_poor_artist.background_ability: The Muse Smiles — Once per Day, gain a sudden burst of inspiration, allowing you to gain Advantage (1D4 + your Performance) on a single Non-Combat roll.

religious_fanatic.background_ability: Faith Drives Me — Once per Combat, your faith keeps you going. Heal 1D4 HP as a Free Action.

rogue_surgeon.background_ability: Meat is Weak — Once per Combat as a Bonus Action, you can patch up yourself or an Ally. Roll a DC: 10 First Aid check; on a success, you or your ally heals for 1D6.

samurai_otaku.background_ability: Say hello to my little (fake) friend! — You have a collection of high-end, hyper-realistic recreations of popular Samurai gear. All of it is non-functional. Once per day, you can produce a fake version of a Tier-three piece of equipment.

scavenger.background_ability: Oh, What’s This? — Once per day you can happen upon a useful little gizmo, weapon, or piece of equipment worth below 300Cr from the Civilian Gear tables.

student_dropout.background_ability: I Studied For This! — Once per day, recall something you have studied, gaining +2 to any non-combat skill for a single roll.

test_subject.background_ability: Glitch Mode — Once per Combat, as a Free Action, activate Latent Experimental Cyberware. Roll a D4 for a one-turn effect: super speed, pain resistance, enhanced reflexes, or better vision. Afterward, lose 1D4 HP.

underground_fighter.background_ability: Knockout Blow — Once per day, as a Free Action, you can attempt to Stun an enemy after making a successful Melee hit. The enemy rolls against DC 10 Save to avoid being Stunned for one turn.

washed_up_rocker.background_ability: One Last Encore — Once per day, as a Bonus Action, draw all attention, including enemy aggression, to yourself for one Round. All opponents in a combat scene within 30 Feet must roll a DC: 10 plus your Performance Save. On failure, they must include you in their next Attack Action.
